channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: BetBoom Make Statement with PGL Wallachia Season 8 Victory
item.content:encoded:
BetBoom captured the PGL Wallachia Season 8 trophy in emphatic fashion on Sunday, obliterating an in-form Aurora roster in 3-0 fashion.

The statement win puts BetBoom back in the conversation as a force in Tier 1 Dota 2 after a series of ‘so close yet so far’ results had kept them from the top silverware since June 2025 at PGL Wallachia Season 5.

Anticipated Grand Final becomes one-sided stomp

As the Grand Final clash loomed, it was set up to be a climactic end to the event, with the two best teams duking it out. Two teams that had gone 3-0 in the Swiss Stage, only differentiated by a narrow 2-1 Upper Bracket Final win for BetBoom.

Like that UB Final, the initial contest was over an hour in length, but in truth, it never felt as competitive as the game timer looked.

Betboom earned a lead through the laning phase, also getting the best of early engagements. The game settled into a long period of passive scaling as BetBoom built a comfortable gold lead.

Ilya ‘Kiritych’ Ulyanov delivered a 17/3/11 KDA, with Vitalie ‘Save-‘ Melnic and Vladislav ‘Kataomi`’ Semenov amassing 24 and 25 assists respectively as BetBoom finally powered up to take the Ancient.

Games 2 and 3 featured closer early games, which then exploded BetBoom’s favour around the 30-minute mark. Aurora could only secure four kills in what turned into a stomp, before Game 3 followed a similar pattern with Danil ‘gpk’ Skutin’s Puck blowing open the game, ultimately delivering BetBoom the PGL Wallachia Season 8 title.

For Aurora, it’s a bitter pill to swallow. Aurora only lost to BetBoom at the event, going 3-0 in Swiss and being sent to the Lower Bracket by BetBoom after a 2-1 Upper Bracket Final loss.

BetBoom complete dominant PGL Wallachia Season 8 run

It was not just the Grand Final that was dominant. BetBoom dropped only three games the entire event as they rolled the opposition both in the Swiss Stage and through the Upper Bracket.

The roster’s full run through the event was 3-0 in Swiss after defeating Virtus.pro 2-0, Liquid 2-0, and Falcons 2-1.

The playoffs proved to be undaunting for the roster, who had so often wilted in the later stages, defeating Spirit 2-0, Liquid again 2-1, and Aurora 2-1 to make the Grand Final, before the 3-0 Grand Final sweep.

While three of the top teams in Yandex, Tundra, and Spirit suffered from having to field stand-ins, there was little doubt about the legitimate nature of BetBoom’s run, considering the strength of their opposition and how they dealt with them.

BetBoom defeated the BLAST Slam VI winners in Liquid (twice), The International 2025 winners in Team Falcons, and Aurora twice, who have shown incredible runs both at DreamLeague Season 28 and in ESL One Birmingham 2026 groups, before the 7.41 somewhat derailed their tournament.

Can BetBoom keep up this form when Yandex and Tundra are back to full strength? Let us know on our Discord!
For more news, see the latest on the future of Xbox.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.title: When is the Pokémon 30th Anniversary TCG Set Released? Leaked Release Date, Explained
item.content:encoded:
It’s a big year for the Pokémon franchise with a landmark 30th anniversary, which is set to feature a special TCG set, and the release date for the huge drop seems to have been uncovered.

Major anniversary years for the Pokémon franchise are almost always celebrated with a special TCG set, and the 30th anniversary set could be the biggest ever, with the potential for some eye-catching cards to chase.

If you’re desperate to get your hands on the Pokémon 30th Anniversary TCG set, Insider Gaming has all the release date details.

When is The Pokémon TCG 30th Anniversary Set Released?

The official release date for the Pokémon TCG 30th Anniversary set has not been shared, but some major details have been uncovered.

The reliable Pokébeach has reported that the 30th Celebration TCG set will release in Japan on Wednesday, September 16th.

While Japan usually gets sets in advance of worldwide releases, the approach will be different for the 30th anniversary, as The Pokémon Company stated during Pokémon Day in February that the global release would be “simultaneous.”

  • More Insider Gaming: Pokémon TCG Pocket B3 Pulsing Aura—All Leaked Secret Rare & Shiny Cards

However, it’s not expected to be a like-for-like release, and Japan will likely still get the set slightly earlier. The standard international release for the Pokémon TCG is for new sets to drop on a Friday, so it’s expected that the 30th Celebration set will arrive on Friday, September 18th.

A Wednesday release for Japan would result in the region getting the set around a day in advance of other regions, so while it’s not an exact level field, it’s significantly closer in release to other sets.

Additionally, the September 16th release date is exactly the same date as the 20th Anniversary set was released in 2016, and, on the same day, the 30th Celebration Premium Deck Set Espeon & Umbreon releases in Japan.

It remains to be seen whether the deck sets will have a similar release internationally or if they will be saved for a future set later down the line.

What’s Coming in The Pokémon TCG 30th Anniversary Set?

The Pokémon TCG 30th Anniversary set will introduce a brand-new card rarity to the TCG, with Pikachu, Mewtwo, and Mew all featured.

This could relate to the Mew and Mewtwo artwork teased on Pokémon Day, which featured an opalescent design, but full details are unknown for now.

All cards in the set are expected to be holo, similar to the Celebrations set for the 25th anniversary, and it’s expected that several iconic cards from the TCG’s history will be reprinted.

  • More Insider Gaming: Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event: Release Date, Start Times & All Content

The teaser shown on Pokémon Day featured the likes of Charizard from Base Set, Palkia Lv. X, Crystal Lugia, Legend connecting art cards, EX and GX designs, Tag Teams, V and VStar, and Amazing Rare.

The 25th Celebrations set had a similar approach, with a subset featuring 25 classic designs, while promos featured more modern Pokémon with vintage styles, including Light Toxtricity, Dark Sylveon, and Delta Species Mimikyu.

What do you want to see in the Pokémon 30th Anniversary TCG set? Share your wishlist in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, find out how to get Shiny Volcanion in Pokémon Home, and check out the release date for the Chaos Rising TCG Set.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/pokemon-30th-anniversary-tcg-celebration-release-date/

item.title: Does Forza Horizon 6 Have Crossplay? Cross-Platform Status, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Forza Horizon 6 is racing onto the scene imminently with a new adventure awaiting in Japan, and details regarding the crossplay and cross-platform functionality have already been revealed.

The Playground Games title is the latest in the long-running franchise, bringing players to one of the most requested destinations, Japan, and, following the release of Forza Horizon 5 on PlayStation platforms, the door has been opened for more players.

If you’ve got questions about the cross-platform functionalities of Forza Horizon 6, including crossplay and cross-progression, Insider Gaming has all the details.

Does Forza Horizon 6 Have Crossplay?

Yes, Forza Horizon 6 fully supports crossplay between players on Xbox Series X|S and PC, with PlayStation 5 joining the party later this year.

Crossplay is immediately available upon the release of Forza Horizon 6 for players on Xbox and PC consoles, including using the Xbox Play Anywhere feature, and PlayStation 5 gamers will have the feature available when the title launches on the Sony platform later this year.

  • More Insider Gaming: Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition: Price, All Content & Is It Worth It?

This means that gamers will be able to play with friends and other players in Forza Horizon 6 regardless of their platform, which has become a staple for the franchise over the years.

For those who don’t want to utilize crossplay, the feature can be turned off via your console settings, but it’s advised to keep it turned on to ensure your Forza Horizon 6 experience is enjoyed to the fullest.

Does Forza Horizon 6 Have Cross-Progression?

Yes, Forza Horizon 6 supports cross progression, meaning you can continue your adventure across Japan on whatever platform you choose.

This is significant for PlayStation 5 gamers in particular, who have to wait a while longer until the title releases on the Sony platform, but they can begin their journey in Forza Horizon 6 in the meantime on PC or Xbox Series X|S.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Xbox Game Pass?

Players will then be able to transfer their progress to PlayStation 5 upon release, or freely across all platforms, and the Xbox Play Anywhere feature opens the door for PC’s who may not meet the required specifications to play the game.

Internet connection is required for this service, however, so, if you’re playing on the go, make sure to connect to the internet when you can to transfer your saved data into the cloud and make it available to continue on other platforms.

What are you most excited for in Forza Horizon 6? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Forza Horizon 6, check out all the details on the exact release date and start time, and take a look at the full achievement list.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Pokémon TCG Pocket B3 Pulsing Aura—All Leaked Secret Rare & Shiny Cards
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon TCG Pocket fans are always playing catch-up in the bid to collect them all, and the task gets even harder with the release of the B3 Pulsing Aura set, featuring a large chunk of Secret Rare and Shiny cards.

TCG Pocket’s monthly releases have proven to be a stern challenge for those looking to master sets, and after two back-to-back smaller sets were released, it’s time for another bumper edition with Pulsing Aura.

If you want to see all of the leaked Secret Rare and Shiny cards ahead of release, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Pokémon TCG Pocket Pulsing Aura Leaked Secret Rare Cards

Pulsing Aura is the next mainline set in Pokémon TCG Pocket, meaning there’s a monstrous amount of Secret Rare cards to pull, totalling over 50.

The main headliners are new Mega Evolution Pokémon, including Mega Lucario, Mega Sceptile, and Mega Camerupt, but there’s also a host of exceptional artwork for fan-favourites across the generation.

  • More Insider Gaming: Pokémon TCG Pocket B3 Pulsing Aura—Release Date, Start Time & Confirmed Cards List

Pokémon TCG Pocket’s Pulsing Aura set also features new artwork, rather than some of the smaller sets that reused artwork from the physical TCG, meaning a fresh batch of eye-catching cards to add to your collection.

Check out the table below for all the leaked Secret Rare cards in Pulsing Aura!

All Pokémon TCG Pocket Pulsing Aura Leaked Shiny Cards

Since Shiny Pokémon first arrived in TCG Pocket in Shining Revelry, every new set has featured a handful of Shiny cards to collect, and Pulsing Aura has over 25 arrival.

This includes Shiny Mega Evolution cards for Steelix, Absol, and Blaziken, alongside a bunch of other Shiny cards, including Torchic, Porygon, Zubat, and Chansey.

  • More Insider Gaming: When Will Pokémon Champions Add More Pokémon?

The best thing about Shiny cards in Pokémon TCG Pocket is that they don’t take up one of the spots in your packs, and, if you’re lucky enough to get one, they come as a bonus card when you’re ripping.

Check out the table below for all the new Shiny Cards arriving in the Pokémon TCG Pocket Pulsing Aura set!

Are you excited for the release of Pulsing Aura in Pokémon TCG Pocket? Share all your pulls in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, take a look at the new Pokémon Champions special roster, and take a look at the details of the Pokémon Poklopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt event.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 27, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 27, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Large fruit
  • Hint 2: Grow on palm trees
  • Hint 3: People drink out of them on vacation

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Avocado
  • Cashew
  • Butter
  • Almond
  • Papaya
  • Cocoa
  • Pineapple
  • Mango
  • Banana

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 27, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Coconut

A Coconut is a large fruit with a thick, hard shell covered in fibre, which contains white flesh that can be eaten as well as a drinkable, clear liquid.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 28.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
